历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 1784 → 3231 → 3705 → 4085 → 4962, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3178 places over the past 5 years; the 2025 baseline is about 4962, a backward shift of about 877 places compared to 2024, a significant decline; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 61, 61, 64, 61, and 60 respectively, basically stable in the 60–64 range; the 2026 plan significantly expands enrollment to 74, an increase of 14 (+23.3%) compared to 2025, a notable expansion, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 18th (Top20) in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the 16–18 range in recent years, a top domestic engineering powerhouse; Civil Engineering A+, Urban and Rural Planning A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Architecture A, Transportation Engineering A, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A, Marine Science A, Biology A, Computer Science and Technology A, etc., with 17 disciplines rated A- or above, strong engineering capabilities; reputation evaluation in 2022 was clearly negative (Henan admission cutoff collapse), in 2023 somewhat negative (Civil Engineering major score plummet), in 2025 somewhat negative (admission cutoff plummeted to 604 points); 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents, but Tongji as a prestigious old school has strong reputation resilience; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 26th (relatively hot), short video exposure at an upper-middle level.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Tongji University is located in Shanghai, strongly attractive to Hubei candidates; the 2025 Hubei Province Physics Category provincial control line (undergraduate batch) was 426 points, down 11 points from 437 points in 2024, reflecting a slightly looser overall competitive environment; Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other engineering majors were consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026; Civil and Architecture majors continue to be clearly discouraged, but Tongji's Civil Engineering is A+, with limited impact; the total number of candidates in Hubei Province in 2026 is about 393,700, with Physics Category estimated at about 251,400, a slight increase of about 0.6% compared to 2025 (249,800), slightly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in recent years, the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+23.3%), the slight increase in Hubei candidates, and the somewhat negative reputation but partially priced in, based on the 2025 baseline of 4962, the expansion effect dominates the backward shift, but the increase in candidates and reputation factors slightly offset; the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 5687, with a range of 5187–6187.
